name: brainstorming
description: Facilitate interactive brainstorming sessions using diverse creative techniques and ideation methods

name: party-mode
description: Orchestrates group discussions between all installed BMAD agents, enabling natural multi-agent conversations

name: create-product-brief
description: Create comprehensive product briefs through collaborative step-by-step discovery as creative Business Analyst working with the user as peers.

name: research
description: Conduct comprehensive research across multiple domains using current web data and verified sources - Market, Technical, Domain and other research types.

name: create-ux-design
description: Work with a peer UX Design expert to plan your applications UX patterns, look and feel.

name: prd
description: PRD tri-modal workflow - Create, Validate, or Edit comprehensive PRDs

name: check-implementation-readiness
description: Critical validation workflow that assesses PRD, Architecture, and Epics & Stories for completeness and alignment before implementation. Uses adversarial review approach to find gaps and issues.

name: create-architecture
description: Collaborative architectural decision facilitation for AI-agent consistency. Replaces template-driven architecture with intelligent, adaptive conversation that produces a decision-focused architecture document optimized for preventing agent conflicts.

name: create-epics-and-stories
description: Transform PRD requirements and Architecture decisions into comprehensive stories organized by user value. This workflow requires completed PRD + Architecture documents (UX recommended if UI exists) and breaks down requirements into implementation-ready epics and user stories that incorporate all available technical and design context. Creates detailed, actionable stories with complete acceptance criteria for development teams.

name: code-review
description: Perform an ADVERSARIAL Senior Developer code review that finds 3-10 specific problems in every story. Challenges everything: code quality, test coverage, architecture compliance, security, performance. NEVER accepts `looks good` - must find minimum issues and can auto-fix with user approval.

name: correct-course
description: Navigate significant changes during sprint execution by analyzing impact, proposing solutions, and routing for implementation

name: create-story
description: Create the next user story from epics+stories with enhanced context analysis and direct ready-for-dev marking

name: dev-story
description: Execute a story by implementing tasks/subtasks, writing tests, validating, and updating the story file per acceptance criteria

name: retrospective
description: Run after epic completion to review overall success, extract lessons learned, and explore if new information emerged that might impact the next epic

name: sprint-planning
description: Generate and manage the sprint status tracking file for Phase 4 implementation, extracting all epics and stories from epic files and tracking their status through the development lifecycle

name: sprint-status
description: Summarize sprint-status.yaml, surface risks, and route to the right implementation workflow.

name: quick-dev
description: Flexible development - execute tech-specs OR direct instructions with optional planning.

name: quick-spec
description: Conversational spec engineering - ask questions, investigate code, produce implementation-ready tech-spec.

name: document-project
description: Analyzes and documents brownfield projects by scanning codebase, architecture, and patterns to create comprehensive reference documentation for AI-assisted development

name: create-excalidraw-dataflow
description: Create data flow diagrams (DFD) in Excalidraw format

name: create-excalidraw-diagram
description: Create system architecture diagrams, ERDs, UML diagrams, or general technical diagrams in Excalidraw format

name: create-excalidraw-flowchart
description: Create a flowchart visualization in Excalidraw format for processes, pipelines, or logic flows

name: create-excalidraw-wireframe
description: Create website or app wireframes in Excalidraw format

name: generate-project-context
description: Creates a concise project-context.md file with critical rules and patterns that AI agents must follow when implementing code. Optimized for LLM context efficiency.

name: testarch-atdd
description: Generate failing acceptance tests before implementation using TDD red-green-refactor cycle

name: testarch-automate
description: Expand test automation coverage after implementation or analyze existing codebase to generate comprehensive test suite

name: testarch-ci
description: Scaffold CI/CD quality pipeline with test execution, burn-in loops, and artifact collection

name: testarch-framework
description: Initialize production-ready test framework architecture (Playwright or Cypress) with fixtures, helpers, and configuration

name: testarch-nfr
description: Assess non-functional requirements (performance, security, reliability, maintainability) before release with evidence-based validation

name: testarch-test-design
description: Dual-mode workflow: (1) System-level testability review in Solutioning phase, or (2) Epic-level test planning in Implementation phase. Auto-detects mode based on project phase.

name: testarch-test-review
description: Review test quality using comprehensive knowledge base and best practices validation

name: testarch-trace
description: Generate requirements-to-tests traceability matrix, analyze coverage, and make quality gate decision (PASS/CONCERNS/FAIL/WAIVED)

name: workflow-init
description: Initialize a new BMM project by determining level, type, and creating workflow path

name: workflow-status
description: Lightweight status checker - answers ""what should I do now?"" for any agent. Reads YAML status file for workflow tracking. Use workflow-init for new projects.

name: api-client-generator
description: Generate Laravel HTTP client code for WorkStudio API protocols

name: api-resource-generator
description: Generate Laravel API resources for WorkStudio tables

name: cdv-form-analyzer
description: Deep-dive analysis of any WorkStudio CDV form definition

name: data-quality-report
description: Audit WorkStudio tables for dead fields, empty tables, and data anomalies

name: job-lifecycle-tracer
description: Trace WorkStudio jobs through status transitions and lifecycle stages

name: Job Status Tracer
description: Trace how jobs flow through the WorkStudio status pipeline using JOBHISTORY transitions, sign-off chains, and live status distributions

name: livewire-scaffold
description: Generate Livewire CRUD components for WorkStudio tables

name: migration-generator
description: Create Laravel migrations from WorkStudio schema

name: model-generator
description: Generate complete Laravel Eloquent models with relationships

name: priority-tables
description: Quick reference to the 5 priority WorkStudio tables

name: protocol-explorer
description: Interactive browsing and explanation of WorkStudio API protocols

name: query-builder
description: Guided SQL query construction from natural language

name: relationship-mapper
description: Visualize how WorkStudio tables connect to each other

name: schema-sync
description: Update local schema documentation from WorkStudio API

name: table-explorer
description: Interactive deep-dive into any WorkStudio table

name: Unit Deep-Dive
description: Interactive guided workflow for exploring WorkStudio vegetation units across all knowledge layers
